title: FRIENDS OF THE ANIMALS - 211info
text: FRIENDS OF THE ANIMALS FRIENDS OF THE ANIMALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides cat and dog services including adoption, foster and volunteer opportunities, an events calendar, and pet resources. Accepts donations from their wish list page as well as those of a monetary nature. 1875 Highway 99 N Suite B-10 Ashland, OR 975359752 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Ashland office phone: Tuesday-Friday noon-4pm Donation drop off: Monday 1pm-4pm Email (541) 708-0090 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 708-0090 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Administrative Entities Animal Adoption Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Foster Care/Temporary Shelter for Animals Other Services Offered At This Location: VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
